bull.b: Rollout of a bitcoin rewards credit card, supported by low fraud rates on existing cards, could attract higher-value customers and boost engagement with Fold's wallet through rewards-linked usage.
Bitcoin gift card provides a low-cost retail and online distribution channel that can expand Fold's user base and enable cross-selling of wallet and payment services.
Rebuilt mobile app with a modern React architecture creates a modular platform that should accelerate feature development and simplify integration of future products.

bear.b: Need for capital raises could lead to dilution that reduces existing shareholder value if additional funding is required to support growth initiatives.
Strong competition from better-capitalized firms and pressure on product pricing may limit revenue growth and compress margins for Fold's offerings.
Dependence on third-party partners for custody and banking services exposes Fold to operational disruptions and regulatory obstacles that could restrict market access.
